Title: User Registration
Description: The system shall allow a new user to register using email and password.

Title: User Login
Description: The system shall allow registered users to log in using valid credentials.

Title: Add Friend
Description: The system shall allow users to send a friend request to another user.

Title: Accept/Reject Friend Request
Description: The system shall allow users to accept or reject incoming friend requests.

Title: View Friends List
Description: The system shall display a list of accepted friends for the logged-in user.

Title: Remove Friend
Description: The system shall allow users to remove an existing friend from their friends list.

Title: Search Users
Description: The system shall allow users to search for other users by name or email.

Title: Profile Update
Description: The system shall allow users to update their profile information such as name and profile picture.

Title: Password Reset
Description: The system shall allow users to reset their password via email verification.

Title: Privacy Settings
Description: The system shall allow users to configure privacy settings for their profile and friend visibility.
